list.title: Your group savings
list.description: Rotating savings with people wey you trust. Every round dey hold by on-chain contract, no be person.
list.emptyHint: Invite friends or family and set your contribution

info.susu: How Susu dey work: everybody dey put fixed amount every round. For rotation circle, one member dey collect the whole pot every round until everybody don get turn. For accumulation circle, everybody dey save inside one shared pot and collect im own savings for the end. Everything dey verifiable for Monad.

rotation.title: Rotation
rotation.description: Take turns. Everybody dey pay every round, and one member dey collect the whole pot until all don get turn.

accumulation.title: Accumulation
accumulation.description: Save together. Everybody dey pay inside one shared pot and collect im own savings for the end.

targetPayout.label: Target payout per person (USDC)
targetPayout.hint: Wetin each member go collect when e be im turn.

emails.label: Member emails
emails.hintRotation: (invite up to {{count}}, put comma between dem)
emails.tooManyRotation: Too many invites. Circle of {{size}} get space for {{count}} apart from you.
emails.tooManyAccumulation: Too many members. Circle fit get 20 people max (you + 19 wey you invite).

summary.youReceiveEnd: You go collect for the end
summary.rotationDetail: Each of the {{count}} members dey pay {{base}} base + {{fee}} fee (2%). When e be your turn you go collect {{payout}}. The circle go start by itself once everybody don join.
summary.accumulationDetail: Your own savings go come back after {{count}} rounds.

image.label: Circle picture (optional)
image.hint: As the circle admin, add photo to gather your group around the goal.

card.joinedProgress: {{joined}} of {{target}} don join · e go start by itself when e full
card.forming: Dey form. Dey wait to start.

detail.notFound: We no fit find that circle.

build.title: Build your circle
build.descAccumulation: Invite people by email. Everybody dey save inside one shared pot for {{count}} rounds, then dem go collect their savings. Start the circle once everybody don enter.
build.descTargeted: Invite people by email. {{joined}} of {{target}} don join. The circle go start by itself the moment the last person join.
build.descRotation: Invite people by email. Rounds equal members, so everybody go get exactly one payout. Start the circle once everybody don enter.
build.needMore: Invite at least one more member to start the circle.

delete.title: Delete circle
delete.description: Nobody else never join, so you fit delete this circle. Once another member join, you no fit delete am again. This one go remove the circle and any pending invite for good.

schedule.descAccumulation: Everybody dey save inside one shared pot. After {{count}} rounds, each member go collect im own savings, locked on-chain.
schedule.descRotation: The rotation lock on-chain, so everybody know who go collect the pot, and when.

escrow.title: On-chain escrow
escrow.description: Contributions dey settle inside this Susu escrow for Monad. Dem dey take {{fee}}% protocol fee from every payout.

toast.streakDescription: Nice, this contribution dey count for your savings streak.

privy.selfCustody: Your wallet na self-custody. Connect am make you sign the contribution yourself.
privy.notAvailable: On-chain contributions no dey available for this deployment.
